Publications

Lab publications list. Team members’ names are highlighted in bold.

2026

  • The latitudinal speciation gradient in freshwater fishes: Higher speciation across assemblages at higher latitudes in the northern hemisphere
    Juliana Herrera-Pérez, Juan D. Carvajal-Quintero, Axel Arango, Daniel Valencia-Rodríguez, Ana Berenice García-Andrade, P. Tedesco, Fabricio Villalobos
    PLoS One (2026)

  • Payment-based open access is biasing scientific participation from the Global South in ecology
    P. Y. Huais, S. Díaz, R. Aguilar, Fabricio Villalobos, J. M. Cordier, A. N. Tomba, A. T. Peterson, J. Nori
    Oikos (2026)

  • Advances in the Biogeography of Neotropical Mammals
    Luis D. Verde Arregoitia, Fabricio Villalobos
    In: Mammals of Middle and South America. Springer (2026)

  • Evolutionary Responses to Climate Change
    Fabricio Villalobos, S. F. Gouveia, J. A. F. Diniz-Filho
    Encyclopedia of Evolutionary Biology, 2nd Edition (2026)
